slash_commands.name: /help
slash_commands.summary: Show available slash commands and shortcuts

slash_commands.name: /clear
slash_commands.summary: Start a fresh conversation, clearing context

slash_commands.name: /compact
slash_commands.summary: Summarise the conversation to free up context

slash_commands.name: /model
slash_commands.summary: Switch the model used for this session

slash_commands.name: /config
slash_commands.summary: Open the settings UI for theme, model, hooks, etc.

slash_commands.name: /voice
slash_commands.summary: Toggle voice input/output (needs sox + local mic)

slash_commands.name: /cost
slash_commands.summary: Show token usage and approximate cost for this session

slash_commands.name: /login
slash_commands.summary: Sign in with your Anthropic account (subscription OAuth)

slash_commands.name: /logout
slash_commands.summary: Sign out of the current Anthropic account

slash_commands.name: /init
slash_commands.summary: Initialise a CLAUDE.md with codebase documentation

slash_commands.name: /review
slash_commands.summary: Review a pull request or current branch

slash_commands.name: /memory
slash_commands.summary: Open the memory file in your editor

slash_commands.name: /permissions
slash_commands.summary: Edit project permissions (allowed Bash/MCP tools)

slash_commands.name: /mcp
slash_commands.summary: Manage MCP servers connected to this session

slash_commands.name: /agents
slash_commands.summary: List or open subagent definitions

slash_commands.name: /hooks
slash_commands.summary: Configure hooks that fire on Claude Code events

slash_commands.name: /resume
slash_commands.summary: Resume a previous session in this directory

slash_commands.name: /fast
slash_commands.summary: Toggle fast mode (Opus with faster output)

slash_commands.name: /loop
slash_commands.summary: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval

slash_commands.name: /ultrareview
slash_commands.summary: Launch a multi-agent cloud review of the current branch

slash_commands.name: /bug
slash_commands.summary: Report a bug to Anthropic with session context

slash_commands.name: /quit
slash_commands.summary: Exit the Claude Code session

--model.description: Override the default Claude model for this run (e.g. claude-opus-4-7, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5).

--print.description: Print the response and exit instead of starting an interactive session.

--resume.description: Resume a previous session by ID, or pick from a list when given no ID.
